overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the character Arthur Morgan walking along a dirt trail through open grassland prairie. Two horse-drawn wagons pass by during the journey—one from the opposite direction and one overtaking from behind—set against a backdrop of distant mountains under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail intersection with abandoned wagon

events.description: horse-drawn wagon with two occupants approaches from the opposite direction down the trail
wagon passes by on the right side and continues down the trail away from the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail toward the crossroads where an abandoned wagon sits

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon traveling in the opposite direction, passing by the character on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden wagon cart with broken wheels sitting off the side of the trail
worn dirt path with visible wheel ruts cutting through the tall grass
rocky mountain peaks visible on the horizon beneath scattered white clouds
tall green and golden prairie grass covering the rolling hills on both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open prairie, approaching a crossroads where an abandoned wooden wagon sits on the left. A horse-drawn wagon with two occupants approaches from the distance, passes by on the right, and continues down the trail. The landscape features rolling grassland with distant rocky mountains under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail through open grassland prairie

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt trail through the open grassland, following the path as it curves gently

entered.detail: large boulders and rock outcroppings dotting the hillside to the right of the trail
single weathered wooden post marking the boundary of the trail
clusters of green shrubs and yucca plants growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone along the winding dirt trail through expansive prairie grassland. The terrain features scattered rocks on the right hillside and occasional bushes alongside the path. The mountain range shifts to the left side of the frame as the trail curves, with the abandoned wagon now far behind.

events.description: covered wagon approaches rapidly from behind on the right side of the trail
wagon overtakes the character and moves ahead down the trail

agents.ego_description: walking as a covered wagon approaches from behind and overtakes on the right

notable_agents.action: covered horse-drawn wagon with driver overtaking the character from behind at a faster pace

entered.detail: wooden covered wagon with canvas canopy and two horses pulling it, carrying a driver on the seat

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a covered horse-drawn wagon approaches rapidly from behind and overtakes on the right side of the trail. The wagon, driven by an NPC, passes by and moves ahead down the dirt path, eventually pulling away into the distance as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the grassland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a winding dirt trail through an expansive prairie that shifts from a busy crossroads to a solitary stretch of grassland. It begins with the character approaching an abandoned wooden wagon as a horse-drawn carriage with two occupants passes by on the right against a backdrop of distant rocky mountains. As the character continues forward, the trail curves and the mountain range shifts toward the left of the frame, leaving the abandoned wagon far behind amidst scattered rocks and hillside bushes. The scene then evolves as a covered wagon rapidly approaches from behind and overtakes the character on the right. Finally, the wagon pulls away into the distance, leaving the character to maintain a steady pace through the open, sunlit landscape.
